policy.title: Absence policy
policy.subtitle: Types, duration and applicable regulations under the ET and collective agreement
policy.legalNotice: The rights listed are legal minimums established by the Workers' Statute (RDL 2/2015). The applicable collective agreement may improve these conditions.

note.vacation: Legal minimum. The collective agreement may extend this period. Start date is set by mutual agreement.
note.sick: Social Security benefit from day 4: 60% of regulatory base up to day 20; 75% from day 21.
note.personal: Paid leave under Art. 37.3 ET. See the table below for durations by reason.
note.other: Absences not covered by the above categories. Require prior agreement with the manager.

policy.permissionsDesc: The employee is entitled to paid absence from work in the following cases:

perm.marriage: Marriage or civil partnership (subject to collective agreement)
perm.birth: Birth of child, adoption or foster care
perm.hospital: Hospitalisation or serious surgery of 1st/2nd-degree relative
perm.civic: Fulfilment of public, civic or trade-union duty
perm.medical: Medical appointment (self or immediate family member)

policy.accRule1: Only vacation days may be carried over to the following year (Art. 38.3 ET).
policy.accRule2: A maximum of 5 unused days are automatically carried over to the following year.
policy.accRule3: Carried-over days expire on 31 March of the current year.
policy.accRule4: Sick leave, Art. 37.3 ET leave and other types are not accumulable.
policy.notifDesc: The system sends automatic notifications for the following events:
policy.notifSubmitted: Request submitted — the manager receives an alert with the pending request.
policy.notifApproved: Request approved — the employee receives confirmation in the notification bell.
policy.notifRejected: Request rejected — the employee receives the rejection notice in the bell.
policy.notifLowDays: Low days — the employee receives an alert when fewer than 5 vacation days remain.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.approvedBody: Your request for {{days}} day(s) has been approved.
notifications.rejectedBody: Your request for {{days}} day(s) has been rejected.
notifications.submittedBody: {{name}} has submitted a request for {{days}} day(s).
notifications.daysLowBody: You only have {{days}} vacation days left this year.
